input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8771 [Automation] javac compile fails for org.apache.maven:maven-core:2.0.7; label=fails-javac-compile; body_chars=8015

risks: The reported failure is an API/constructor mismatch between existing 2.0.6 tests and Maven 2.0.7 transitive classes, not missing setup.

Tests that attempt a real Maven build may touch the local Maven repository or network; generated tests should prefer isolated in-process APIs or temporary projects rather than relying on external repositories.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: Resolved org.apache.maven:maven-core:2.0.7 brings its Maven/Plexus/ClassWorlds/Wagon dependencies transitively, and meaningful coverage is reachable through in-process Maven core APIs and CLI/version/diagnoser/lifecycle paths without an external service, Docker image, or extra Maven dependency.
